summary: 今日社区热点：2.0版本「永夜序章」正式公告引爆全平台讨论；新角色「赫尔墨斯」立绘与技能曝光，玩家热议强度定位；官方宣布与知名IP联动企划；Reddit 社区发起角色强度排行投票；B站UP主深度解析新机制。

news.title: 【官方公告】2.0版本「永夜序章」前瞻直播定档3月28日
news.summary: 官方确认2.0版本前瞻直播时间，届时将公布新章节剧情、新角色、新玩法等重磅内容。直播还将发放兑换码福利。
news.author: 忘却前夜官方

news.title: New character Hermes leaked - skills and kit analysis
news.summary: Datamined info on upcoming 5-star character Hermes reveals a unique time-manipulation mechanic. Community theorycrafters are already comparing to existing DPS units.
news.author: u/MorimensLeaks

news.title: 赫尔墨斯完整技能翻译+机制深度解析｜忘却前夜
news.summary: UP主详细翻译并解析了新角色赫尔墨斯的全部技能，包括天赋、星座效果，并与现有角色进行了对比分析。
news.author: 忘夜攻略组

news.title: Morimens x EVA collaboration officially announced!
news.summary: Official Twitter account just revealed an Evangelion collaboration event coming in 2.0. Collab characters and themed events confirmed.
news.author: @MorimensGlobal

news.title: TapTap评分持续上涨，玩家：1.8版本剧情封神
news.summary: 忘却前夜在TapTap评分突破9.2，大量玩家给出五星好评，称赞1.8版本主线剧情的叙事深度和演出质量。

news.title: [讨论] 2.0深渊新环境怎么配队？提前规划讨论帖
news.summary: NGA玩家根据已知信息讨论2.0新深渊环境下的阵容搭配，多位大佬给出了针对新机制的配队思路。
news.author: 深渊常客

news.title: Global community Q&A session with devs - Key takeaways
news.summary: Developers held a Q&A in the official Discord. Key points: QoL improvements coming in 2.0, no plans for PvP, and a new guild system is in development.
news.author: ModTeam

news.title: Morimens OST - 'Prelude to Oblivion' Full Orchestra Ver. | OFFICIAL MV
news.summary: Official YouTube channel released the full orchestral version of the main theme. Production quality praised by music community.

news.title: Current banner worth pulling? Athena analysis and recommendations
news.summary: Detailed analysis of the current Athena banner. Consensus: strong support unit, but 2.0 characters may be higher priority for F2P players.
